title: libpod: Add FreeBSD support for ConmonOCIRuntime
body:
Most of the code is shared between Linux and FreeBSD so initially we rename oci_*_linux.go to oci_*_common.go. Linux-specific features such as SELinux and cgroups are moved back to the _linux.go file.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
The diffstat is painful, but the fact that it's mostly just moving code is promising. Tests continuing to pass is quite promising.

LGTM

> The diffstat is painful, but the fact that it's mostly just moving code is promising. Tests continuing to pass is quite promising.
> 
> LGTM

I kept the file renames separate from the refactors which was intended to make it easier to see the actual changes. There should be no functional difference on Linux (unless I messed up of course).
